title: Poll shows voter confidence in economy plummeting to a nearly 4-year low
description: Concerns about rising costs are a problem for Republicans ahead of the midterm elections as Trump struggles to deliver on affordability pledges.

title: Call to imprison ‘American Zionists’ and shadowy spending roil Texas runoff
description: Incendiary comments by a House candidate in Texas prompted condemnation from her fellow Democrats, who accused Republicans of propping her up.

title: 'We'll never know if he could have been saved.' The gaps in Trump's rural health fund
description: Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.

title: As voters prioritize cost of living, focus on abortion evolves in midterm elections
description: There's been a shift in attention in the party ahead of the midterms as voters rank affordability the top issue. That raises questions about what an evolving message on reproductive rights looks like.

title: Takeaways from the DNC's 'autopsy' of the 2024 presidential election
description: NPR's Steve Inskeep speaks with political strategist and Clinton White House counselor Paul Begala about the DNC's "autopsy" dissecting its defeat in the 2024 presidential election.

title: Trump's interest in Cuba is political -- and personal
description: The U.S. government's indictment of former Cuban President Raúl Castro came as President Trump also hinted at military action. But Trump's interest in Cuba isn't just political -- it's also personal.

title: UN gravely concerned by an Afghan Taliban law that has provisions on child marriage
description: The United Nations expressed "grave concern" on Thursday about a new law issued by Afghanistan's Taliban government on separation in marriage which includes provisions on child marriage.

title: Pressure from Silicon Valley helped block Trump’s expected order on AI
description: Industry leaders warned in last-minute calls to the president that the proposed safety vetting system could inhibit development of the pivotal technology.

title: Rubio doubtful of diplomacy with Cuba as Trump raises new threat of military action
description: President Donald Trump and America's top diplomat on Thursday again raised the specter of U.S. military intervention in Cuba, a day after the administration announced criminal charges against the island's former leader, Raúl Castro.

title: What happened under Trump this week
description: It was a busy one.

title: Trump to ease rule on climate super pollutants, says move will cut costs
description: Industry trade groups reject the administration's claims, saying the rollback of the Biden-era regulations would actually drive up prices.

title: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show
description: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Trump's towering arch clears another federal hurdle, despite public pushback
description: The Commission of Fine Arts gave the arch design its final approval, even though it's missing some visual components. The president said Thursday that he doesn't need approval from Congress.

title: Republicans to leave Washington without ICE funding vote
description: Congressional Republicans hoped to pass a bill to fund ICE for three years by the end of this week, but that plan faltered over disagreements with President Trump.

title: Supreme Court dismisses death penalty case on people with mental disabilities
description: The majority dismissed on procedural grounds the case of Joseph Clifton Smith, whose mental faculties skirt the threshold for being spared the death penalty.

title: Senate Republicans rebel against Trump's $1.8 trillion fund
description: In a rare rebuke, Senate Republicans postponed a vote to fund immigration enforcement amid alarm over the novel fund

title: Democrats wanted answers for what went wrong in 2024. Now, there are more questions
description: The Democratic Party wanted a review of the 2024 election. Then, the DNC learned the report was incomplete and unverifiable, party chairman Ken Martin said Thursday, releasing an annotated version.

title: Trump’s allies are already lining up to apply to his $1.8 billion fund
description: Jan. 6 rioters, George Santos, Mark McCloskey and Rod Blagojevich: A wide range of figures are eyeing the president’s new settlement fund.

title: Trump demands Senate fire parliamentarian who ruled against ballroom funding plan
description: The demand comes as Senate Republican leaders wrestle with whether to include money for the controversial project in a bill that funds immigration agencies.

title: At Coast Guard commencement, Trump tells grads to lead ‘national resurgence’
description: The president linked the force’s mission to his own priorities, domestically and in Iran, in an address at the military academy in Connecticut.

title: In Georgia, Senate GOP primary heads to runoff where electability is top issue
description: Georgia was among six states where voters participated in primaries Tuesday. Its Senate race is among a handful that could determine party control next year.

title: The Trump paradox: What’s good for him is weighing down his party
description: The president has created a party that is loyal to him, even when he takes executive actions that anger the broader public. That dynamic leaves him weaker with those outside his base.

title: Barney Frank, influential congressman and gay rights hero, dies at 86
description: The Massachusetts Democrat led a sweeping overhaul of the financial industry and was one of the first openly gay members of Congress.
